content:
1. Generates a monthly article summary report from a database. Exists for a demo but scales poorly (N+1 queries).
2. Avoid N+1 pattern: batch-fetch authors. Push category filtering to SQL. Performance degrades with more articles.
3. Whether to batch-fetch authors or push filter to SQL (see "Open:" comment).
4. Missing authors cause KeyError. Empty month or no matching categories produce empty report. Month/year validation is minimal (e.g., month 13).
